# Getting Support for Super-Cache

## Free Support

For bugs, open a GitHub issue. For questions about configuration and deployment, open a GitHub Discussion. Community members and the author monitor both.

## Commercial Support

For production support, custom development, or Customisation Licences, contact Faisal Hanif at imfanee@gmail.com. Response time for commercial enquiries is within 2 business days.

## Documentation

Full documentation is available in the docs directory of this repository. Start with README.md for a project overview, docs/OPERATIONS_RUNBOOK.md for deployment guidance, and docs/CONFIGURATION_REFERENCE.md for all configuration parameters.
